differential_diagnoses: Drug reaction with eosinophilia and systemic symptoms (DRESS)
next_steps: Repeat skin biopsy with T-cell receptor (TCR) gene rearrangement studies and immunophenotyping
Peripheral blood flow cytometry for Sézary cells
Excisional biopsy of enlarged lymph node for histopathologic evaluation
Biopsy of pulmonary nodules to investigate underlying malignancy or systemic process
Discontinue unnecessary medications and re-evaluate for potential drug-induced causes
Infectious disease consultation and continued targeted antimicrobial therapy based on culture results
Perform excisional lymph node biopsy with flow cytometry and immunohistochemistry
Perform biopsy of pulmonary nodule to rule out malignancy
Send peripheral blood flow cytometry for Sézary cell quantification and T-cell phenotyping
Conduct T-cell receptor (TCR) gene rearrangement studies on skin and blood samples
Perform bone marrow aspiration and biopsy with cytogenetics
Complete dermatological and oncological subspecialty consultations for comprehensive staging
